arts.ttl: Tottenham eyeing €40m-rated ace considered one of the most promising talents in Europe
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly keen on signing the Lecce left-back Patrick Dorgu. A report from Football Insider claims that they are keen on snapping up some of the best young talents in European football, and they are keeping tabs on the 19-year-old Serie A defender. It will be interesting to see if Tottenham follow up […] The post Tottenham eyeing €40m-rated ace considered one of the most promising talents in Europe appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs West Ham Premier League score predicted as Spurs star makes dream return
arts.sum: A 2-1 loss at home followed by a 1-1 draw in east London saw Spurs pick up just one point against the Hammers last season, with Spurs having won just two of their last eight league games against West Ham. After missing the last three games, Son Heung-min will be available for selection against West Ham – a massive boost for Postecoglou's side. After going on a six-game win streak across all competitions, Spurs gave up a two-goal lead and fell to a 3-2 loss against Brighton in their final game before the international break, leaving the Lilywhites ninth in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Tottenham injury latest as Ange Postecoglou gives Son Heung-min and Richarlison update
arts.sum: Spurs will be looking to return to winning ways after the disappointing 3-2 defeat at Brighton before the international break. After a two-week hiatus, Spurs are back in action when they host West Ham and Postecoglou will be boosted with the return of Son and Richarlison.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs West Ham – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: Premier League football resumes in North London this Saturday lunchtime as Tottenham Hotspur host West Ham United. This rivalry has always conjured up drama over the years with late goals and stunning strikes making it one of the most entertaining fixtures in English football. arts.ttl: Tottenham vs West Ham TV channel, live stream and how to watch Premier League clash
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and West Ham United are set to lock horns in a highly anticipated London derby this weekend as the Premier League returns post-international break. Tottenham vs West Ham is the lunchtime game on Saturday, August 19 with kick off at 12:30pm in the UK.

arts.ttl: James Maddison receives priceless Lionel Messi gift from Tottenham teammate
arts.sum: Posting two pictures on his Instagram stories, the Spurs midfielder shared an image of the front of an Argentina shirt with Messi’s iconic number 10 on the front. James Maddison has a very special addition to his well renowned football shirt collection, thanks to his Tottenham teammate Cristian Romero .
